name: @simon_he/vue-tui
description: Vue 3 terminal UI toolkit for browser DOM and CLI stdout renderers
author: Simon He

scripts.build:raw: rimraf dist && tsdown && node scripts/build-cjs.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && node scripts/fix-vue-dts-compat.mjs && node scripts/create-cjs-dts.mjs
scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/basic build
scripts.build:examples:terminal: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/basic build:terminal
scripts.example:basic:terminal-table:smoke: pnpm run build && VT_SMOKE=1 pnpm -C examples/basic terminal:table
scripts.example:agent-console: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/agent-console dev
scripts.example:agent-console:smoke: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/agent-console smoke
scripts.example:agent-console:terminal: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/agent-console terminal
scripts.example:agent-console:terminal:smoke: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/agent-console terminal:smoke
scripts.example:tlog-view-lab: pnpm run build && VT_SMOKE=1 tsx examples/tlog-view-lab.ts
scripts.run:basic:terminal: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/basic terminal
scripts.run:agent-console:terminal: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/agent-console terminal
scripts.run:basic:multi-select:terminal: pnpm run build && pnpm -C examples/basic build:terminal:multi-select && pnpm -C examples/basic terminal:multi-select
scripts.run:tlog-view-lab: pnpm run build && VT_INTERACTIVE=1 tsx examples/tlog-view-lab.ts
scripts.docs:dev: pnpm run docs:gen && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run docs:gen && pnpm run docs:check-public-descriptions && pnpm run api:check-manifest && vitepress build docs
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (process.env.VUE_TUI_ALLOW_DIRECT_PUBLISH !== '1') { console.error('Direct npm publish is disabled. Use pnpm run release:local or the GitHub Release workflow.'); process.exit(1) }"
scripts.publish:npm:patch: pnpm exec bumpp patch --yes --no-commit --no-tag --no-push && (npm whoami >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm login) && VUE_TUI_ALLOW_DIRECT_PUBLISH=1 pnpm publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.release:local: pnpm run release:dry-run && VUE_TUI_ALLOW_DIRECT_PUBLISH=1 npm publish .release/*.tgz --access public --tag rc
scripts.release:local:dry-run: pnpm run release:dry-run && VUE_TUI_ALLOW_DIRECT_PUBLISH=1 npm publish .release/*.tgz --access public --dry-run --tag rc
scripts.release:check: pnpm run check:hidden-unicode && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:coverage:core && pnpm run build:checked && pnpm run test:package-exports:dist && pnpm run check:dist-dts && pnpm run test:types:dist && pnpm run test:browser-vite-import:dist && pnpm run docs:build && pnpm run api:diff && git diff --exit-code -- docs/generated
scripts.release:dry-run: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run release:bench && pnpm run release:smoke && pnpm run release:pack-smoke
scripts.release:pack: rimraf .release && pnpm run build:checked && pnpm pack --pack-destination .release
scripts.release:pack-smoke: pnpm run release:pack && pnpm run test:package-contract:existing && pnpm run release:pack-smoke:existing
scripts.release:smoke: pnpm run example:tlog-view-lab && pnpm run example:agent-console:smoke && pnpm run example:agent-console:terminal:smoke && pnpm run example:basic:terminal-table:smoke
scripts.test:coverage:core: vitest run test/unicode-width.test.ts test/hyperlink-sanitizer.test.ts test/dom-renderer.test.ts test/render-manager.test.ts test/terminal-selection.test.ts test/terminal-scroll-operations.test.ts test/plane-compositor.test.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.reporter text-summary
scripts.test:browser-vite-import: pnpm run build:checked && pnpm run test:browser-vite-import:dist
scripts.test:browser-vite-import:dist: pnpm exec vite build --config test/fixtures/browser-vite-import/vite.config.ts && node scripts/check-browser-vite-import.mjs
scripts.test:ssr-import:package: pnpm run release:pack && pnpm run test:ssr-import:existing
scripts.test:package-contract: pnpm run release:pack && pnpm run test:package-contract:existing
scripts.test:package-exports: pnpm run build:checked && pnpm run test:package-exports:dist
